message:
fix(time): prevent coalescing window boundary overflow at Time::MAX

Replace unchecked arithmetic in timer coalescing window boundary
calculations with saturating_add/saturating_mul to prevent integer
overflow when `now_ns` is near u128::MAX (e.g. timers scheduled at
Time::MAX). Without saturation, the expression `((now/window)+1)*window`
can wrap around to zero, causing timers to never fire.

Fix applied to both `next_coalescing_boundary()` and the coalesced
expiry path in `collect_expired()`.

Add test `coalescing_window_boundary_saturates_at_time_max` verifying
that a timer registered at Time::MAX fires correctly with coalescing
enabled.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
